endpoints.name: GET /v1/matters
endpoints.description: Lists matters the requestor has access to.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/matters
endpoints.description: Creates a matter with the given name and description. The initial state is open, and the owner is the method caller. Returns the created matter with default view.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/matters/{matterId}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified matter.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: PUT /v1/matters/{matterId}
endpoints.description: Updates the specified matter. This updates only the name and description of the matter, identified by matter ID. Changes to any other fields are ignored. Returns the default view of the matter.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/matters/{matterId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified matter. Returns the matter with updated state.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/matters/{matterId}/exports
endpoints.description: Lists details about the exports in the specified matter.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/matters/{matterId}/exports
endpoints.description: Creates an export.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/matters/{matterId}/exports/{exportId}
endpoints.description: Gets an export.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EXPORTID}} with a real exportid. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/matters/{matterId}/exports/{exportId}
endpoints.description: Deletes an export.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{EXPORTID}} with a real exportid. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/matters/{matterId}/holds
endpoints.description: Lists the holds in a matter.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/matters/{matterId}/holds
endpoints.description: Creates a hold in the specified matter.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/matters/{matterId}/holds/{holdId}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified hold.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{HOLDID}} with a real holdid. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: PUT /v1/matters/{matterId}/holds/{holdId}
endpoints.description: Updates the scope (organizational unit or accounts) and query parameters of a hold. You cannot add accounts to a hold that covers an organizational unit, nor can you add organizational units to a hold that covers individual accounts. If you try, the unsupported values are ignored.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{HOLDID}} with a real holdid. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/matters/{matterId}/holds/{holdId}
endpoints.description: Removes the specified hold and releases the accounts or organizational unit covered by the hold. If the data is not preserved by another hold or retention rule, it might be purged.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{HOLDID}} with a real holdid. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/matters/{matterId}/holds/{holdId}/accounts
endpoints.description: Lists the accounts covered by a hold. This can list only individually-specified accounts covered by the hold. If the hold covers an organizational unit, use the [Admin SDK](https://developers.google.com/admin-sdk/). to list the members of the organizational unit on hold.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{HOLDID}} with a real holdid. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/matters/{matterId}/holds/{holdId}/accounts
endpoints.description: Adds an account to a hold. Accounts can be added only to a hold that does not have an organizational unit set. If you try to add an account to an organizational unit-based hold, an error is returned.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{HOLDID}} with a real holdid. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/matters/{matterId}/holds/{holdId}/accounts/{accountId}
endpoints.description: Removes an account from a hold.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{HOLDID}} with a real holdid. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/matters/{matterId}/holds/{holdId}:addHeldAccounts
endpoints.description: Adds accounts to a hold. Returns a list of accounts that have been successfully added. Accounts can be added only to an existing account-based hold.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{HOLDID}} with a real holdid. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/matters/{matterId}/holds/{holdId}:removeHeldAccounts
endpoints.description: Removes the specified accounts from a hold. Returns a list of statuses in the same order as the request.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{HOLDID}} with a real holdid. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/matters/{matterId}/savedQueries
endpoints.description: Lists the saved queries in a matter.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/matters/{matterId}/savedQueries
endpoints.description: Creates a saved query.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/matters/{matterId}/savedQueries/{savedQueryId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves the specified saved query.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SAVEDQUERYID}} with a real savedqueryid. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/matters/{matterId}/savedQueries/{savedQueryId}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified saved query.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SAVEDQUERYID}} with a real savedqueryid. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/matters/{matterId}:addPermissions
endpoints.description: Adds an account as a matter collaborator.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/matters/{matterId}:close
endpoints.description: Closes the specified matter. Returns the matter with updated state.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/matters/{matterId}:count
endpoints.description: Counts the accounts processed by the specified query.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/matters/{matterId}:removePermissions
endpoints.description: Removes an account as a matter collaborator.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/matters/{matterId}:reopen
endpoints.description: Reopens the specified matter. Returns the matter with updated state.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/matters/{matterId}:undelete
endpoints.description: Undeletes the specified matter. Returns the matter with updated state.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MATTERID}} with a real matterid.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a long-running operation. This method indicates that the client is no longer interested in the operation result. It does not cancel the operation. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{name}:cancel
endpoints.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.
